title: campanula bellidifolia subsp. saxifraga
intro: Campanula bellidifolia subsp. saxifraga, also known as the saxifrage bellflower, is a plant species within the Campanulaceae family, typically found in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Campanula bellidifolia subsp. saxifraga include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate urinary tract issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Campanula bellidifolia subsp. saxifraga are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
